title: Barak 8 enters service
subtitle: Indian-Israeli surface-to-air missile
fact: Barak 8, also known as LR-SAM or MR-SAM, is an Indian-Israeli jointly developed surface-to-air missile (SAM) system, designed to defend against any type of airborne threat including aircraft, helicopters, anti-ship missiles, and UAVs as well as ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and combat jets.

Mark 48 torpedo enters service
subtitle: American heavyweight submarine-launched torpedoes
fact: The Mark 48 and its improved Advanced Capability (ADCAP) variant are American heavyweight submarine-launched torpedoes.

Phalanx CIWS Km1992//0.33149874000/0482492-2 enters service
subtitle: Close-in weapon system for defense against anti-ship missiles
fact: The Phalanx CIWS is an automated gun-based close-in weapon system to defend military watercraft automatically against incoming threats such as aircraft, missiles, and small boats.

title: Fattah-1 enters service
subtitle: Iranian hypersonic ballistic missile
fact: Fattah-1 is an Iranian medium-range ballistic missile developed by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps and unveiled in June 2023.

title: GBU-57A/B MOP enters service
subtitle: United States Air Force bunker buster bomb of GBU-57 family
fact: The GBU-57 series MOP—the initials stand for Guided Bomb Unit and Massive Ordnance Penetrator—is a 30,000-pound (14,000 kg) class, 20.5-foot-long (6.2 m) precision-guided munition "bunker buster" bomb developed by Boeing for the United States Air Force (USAF).

title: M1 Abrams enters service
subtitle: Main battle tank family
fact: The M1 Abrams is a third-generation American main battle tank designed by Chrysler Defense and named for General Creighton Abrams.

title: M4 enters service
subtitle: Carbine
fact: The M4 carbine is an assault rifle developed in the United States during the 1980s.

title: Glock enters service
subtitle: Brand of polymer-framed semi-automatic pistols
fact: Glock is a brand of polymer-framed, short-recoil-operated, locked-breech semi-automatic pistols designed and produced by Austrian manufacturer Glock GmbH.

title: M16 enters service
subtitle: Assault rifle
fact: The M16 rifle is a family of assault rifles adapted from the ArmaLite AR-15 rifle for the United States military.

title: GBU-43/B Massive Ordnance Air Blast bomb enters service
subtitle: United States large-yield bomb
fact: The GBU-43/B Massive Ordnance Air Blast is a large-yield bomb, developed for the United States military by Albert L.
